parentAction.completionRule: A parametric universal domain-cover theorem is recorded, or a residual counterfamily/hypotheses packet names the exact uncovered family and denominator.

theoremAttempt.candidateStatement: The symbolic bad-lane congruence and restored family-menu structure classify or finitely cover every relevant pair (n,Q), where n is a future or family representative and Q is a square witness modulus that can obstruct a continuation in the 32 mod 50 lane.
theoremAttempt.reason: The repo currently supplies a universal divisibility identity for a named (n,Q) and a finite 74-instance observed witness census, but it does not supply a parametric relevant-pair enumerator, a finite partition of possible Q, or a recurrence proving that future representatives stay inside the observed cover.

restoredFamilyMenu.auditResult: The menu is replayable local evidence, but it does not quantify over future representatives beyond the restored finite row set.

observedWitnessDomain.auditResult: Observed top-only profile closure is assembled, but contrast-only recombination and all future/unobserved witness pairs remain outside the proof.

residualFamily.badLaneClass: the solution class for m modulo Q / gcd(50*n,Q), when the linear congruence is solvable
uncoveredScope: Any future or unenumerated representative n not produced by a parametric relevant-pair enumerator.
Any square witness modulus Q not bounded by a finite partition or recurrence theorem.
Any observed-period pair not proved to belong to a top-tie, handoff, or contrast-only recombination theorem.
Any post-40500 representative whose safety depends on a finite rollout rather than a theorem-facing sufficiency argument.

missingHypotheses.requiredStatement: Enumerate all relevant future pairs (n,Q) that can obstruct a continuation c = 32 + 50*m, or prove that the restored finite family-menu rows are exhaustive for the theorem context.
missingHypotheses.currentEvidence: The restored family menu has 280 finite rows and 25 known-failure matches; no all-N row generator or recurrence theorem is recorded here.

missingHypotheses.requiredStatement: Bound Q or partition all possible Q into finitely checked square-witness families with an explicit denominator Q/gcd(50*n,Q).
missingHypotheses.currentEvidence: The observed period set is finite for the 74 checked instances, but no proof excludes new Q values.

missingHypotheses.requiredStatement: For every covered (n,Q), prove that the bad lane class is avoided or routed through a top-tie, handoff, companion-gap, or contrast-only theorem.
missingHypotheses.currentEvidence: The observed top-only side is atomized, but the handoff map is finite and row-local.

missingHypotheses.requiredStatement: Recombine the 11 observed contrast-only groups, and any parametric contrast-only families, with the top repair-class handoff.
missingHypotheses.currentEvidence: The observed closure packet explicitly leaves 11 contrast-only groups and 46 instances open.

missingHypotheses.requiredStatement: Prove that the compact 1..40500 base plus symbolic lane theorem suffices beyond 40500, or select a theorem-facing finite regression interval.
missingHypotheses.currentEvidence: The exact interval is promoted only as compact verifier evidence; no 40501+ rollout is justified.

mustProvideOneOf: A parametric relevant-pair enumerator/recurrence that covers every future (n,Q) pair in the 32 mod 50 lane.
A finite Q partition plus handoff map proving every bad lane class is covered.
A concrete residual counterfamily with explicit n, Q, m, bad-lane denominator, and failed handoff.
deterministicBoundary.forbiddenShortcut: Do not start a 40501+ exact rollout or claim universal mod-50 coverage from the 74 finite witness instances alone.

nextTheoremMove: Recover or prove a parametric relevant-pair enumerator for the mod-50 square-witness domain; if the local generator cannot supply one, emit a generator/recurrence blocker naming the missing source.
suggestedVerificationCommand: jq '{theoremAttempt, localAudit, residualFamily, missingHypotheses, deterministicBoundary, recommendedNextAction, claims}' packs/number-theory/problems/848/SPLIT_ATOM_PACKETS/FRONTIER_BRIDGE/P848_MOD50_UNIVERSAL_DOMAIN_COVER_RESIDUAL_PACKET.json
proofBoundary: This packet blocks the universal mod-50 square-witness domain cover at the missing parametric relevant-pair enumerator. It sharpens the residual family and denominator, but does not prove all-N, contrast-only recombination, p4217 complement coverage, or a 40501+ rollout.
